name: Bison Ridge Rec Center
description:
Hours:
Tu-F: 5:30 a.m.-noon
Su: 8:30 a.m.-noon.
Nets provided by the Recr Center.
Some paddles & balls available.
For more information please call the Bison Ridge Recreation Center at 303-286-6800.
Reservations? unknown. I believe that all 3 courts are drop-in play, without need for reservations, but best to call ahead to verify.

name: Brighton Recreation Center
description: Brighton Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brighton, CO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and locker rooms. Reservations are not available.
fees: Fee required — Daily Drop-In Fee or Membership

name: Buckley Space Force Base Fitness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Buckley Space Force Base Fitness Center in Sable, CO! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Built 4 Ballers Indoor Facility
description: Come play pickleball at Built 4 Ballers Indoor Facility in Brighton, CO! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.
fees: Fee required — Check out our website for all the Pickleball Options we have at our facility. Monthly tournaments have a $30 registration fee per player.  We also have monthly membership options

name: Carroll Butts Park
description: Carroll Butts Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Westminster, CO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Chicken N Pickle - Thornton
description: Come play pickleball at Chicken N Pickle - Thornton in Thornton, CO! There are 8 hard courts. 6 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, restrooms, and lights. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Delmar
description: Come play pickleball at Delmar in Sable, CO! There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Heritage Todd Creek Clubhouse
description: These are private courts for HTC residents only.

name: Hyland Hills / Camenisch Park
description: Courts are closed. Their are bad cracks all over the courts.

name: Hyland Hills Sports Center
description: Hyland Hills Sports Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Westminster, CO. There are 5 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are not available.

name: Life Time Westminster
description: Life Time Westminster is a place to play pickleball in Westminster, CO. There are 3 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.

name: Municipal Park
description: Come play pickleball at Municipal Park in Westminster, CO! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Northglenn Recreation Center
description: Northglenn Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Northglenn, CO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Orchard Farms Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Orchard Farms Courts in Thornton, CO! There are 4 outdoor hard and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Pickleball Food Pub
description: Come play pickleball at Pickleball Food Pub in Westminster, CO! There are 8 indoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: The Courts Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at The Courts Sports Complex in Northglenn, CO! There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: The Picklr Thornton
description: We have 9 outdoor-surfaced and official PPA-certified indoor pickleball courts (6 of which will be championship sized), AI coaching technology on three courts, a private and corporate event space, several demo paddles to try out, a Pickleball Central pro-shop, showers and locker room, ball-machine rental, sound-baffling above each court, high-ceilings, black walls, wood finishings, and a dedicated space for warm-up and cool-down exercises. We also hold free "Intro to Pickleball" classes for the community several times a week!  In addition, our memberships are national, so you can go to any Picklr in the nation and continue the benefits as a full member!
fees: Fee required — Members play for free (no court reservations, includes open play, competitive events, tournaments, leagues); All services available for non-members for a fee

name: Trail Winds Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Trail Winds Rec Center in Thornton, CO! There are 4 indoor wood, hard, and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Admission fee required at Recreation Center
